handoffSections.scope: current-user only; no default-user, offline-image, or machine handoff claim is made.
handoffSections.artifact-index: Artifact index lists authorization intake, dry-run gates, negative blockers, approval checklist, and packet preview.
handoffSections.identity-redaction: Target identity is redacted as <redacted-current-user>; no local profile path or private share is present.
handoffSections.evidence-boundary: Handoff uses CI, dry-run, mock, report-only, approval checklist, and packet preview material only. It is not real UX evidence and is not approval.
handoffSections.approval-checklist-summary: Approval checklist is readable and remains separate from authorization review.
handoffSections.negative-blocker-summary: Blockers include scope drift, private path, evidence promotion, wording drift, rollback gap, and runner gate gap.
handoffSections.integrated-preview-summary: Packet preview is readable and remains a preview, not an authorization state.
handoffSections.rollback-or-restore-plan: Restore notes identify source templates, review artifacts, owner, and a separate future discussion path.
handoffSections.runner-gate-reminder: Reusable current runner is acceptable for report-only validation; expanded runner scope requires separate confirmation.
handoffSections.manual-decision-placeholder: Human reviewer may choose handoff-ready-for-human-review, needs-rework, or blocked.
handoffSections.non-execution-statement: This handoff does not approve authorization, execution, true UX restore, or Issue #18 closure.
